personal_info.name: Harnish Jariwala
personal_info.summary: Strategic Cloud Infrastructure Leader with 16+ years of experience specializing in Azure Architecture, FinOps, and Enterprise Governance. Proven track record of scaling high-availability systems, optimizing cloud expenditures, and leading cross-functional teams to deliver resilient, business-critical infrastructure solutions.

bullets: Architected enterprise-grade Azure landing zones, standardizing governance patterns across 10+ customer environments.
Spearheaded HA/DR design reviews for business-critical systems, reducing RTO by 30% through improved failover automation.
Orchestrated cross-functional architecture assessments, proactively mitigating high-risk failure modes in hybrid topologies and enhancing system reliability by a verified 25%.
Mentored a team of 20 engineers on Azure best practices, increasing team deployment velocity by 20%.
Engineered comprehensive observability solutions with Azure Monitor and Grafana, achieving a 40% reduction in MTTR.
Led a team of 5 infrastructure engineers, implementing ITIL-based change management workflows for production environments.
Optimized Azure spend by 15% through the implementation of automated tagging governance and FinOps frameworks.
Championed internal technical hiring initiatives, resulting in a 25% increase in team engineering capacity.
Designed secure hub-spoke network topologies, improving fault isolation across enterprise subscriptions.
Spearheaded disaster recovery testing cycles, ensuring 99.9% uptime compliance for critical business services.
Optimized compute lifecycle management for 500+ virtual machines, reducing maintenance downtime by 25%.
Initiated gap analysis of Azure Landing Zones against Well-Architected Framework, securing stakeholder approval for migration workstreams and reducing post-migration risk.
Validated technical roadmaps for cloud transformation, ensuring resource alignment that accelerated deployment milestones by 15%.
Engineered infrastructure lifecycle management for 2500+ VMs across 5+ Azure subscriptions.
Scaled Azure landing zones to support enterprise growth, implementing strict RBAC and policy-as-code governance.
Achieved $200k+ annual cloud cost savings (approx 20%) through systematic FinOps resource optimization.
Architected robust site recovery solutions that maintained business continuity during regional Azure outages.
Architected high-availability hybrid infrastructure, resulting in a 50% decrease in operational downtime.
Automated critical backup and disaster recovery workflows, ensuring 100% data integrity for medical workloads.
Engineered enterprise AD and DNS migration, improving identity management for 300+ users.
Optimized backup processes for onsite systems, ensuring business resilience for critical diagnostics data.
Managed full-lifecycle server deployments and technical support as a dedicated onsite engineer for a major enterprise client site, achieving a 98% service level agreement (SLA) compliance rate.
Provided onsite technical support, driving consistent 95%+ resolution rates for enterprise service requests.

projects.title: Enterprise Azure Migration & Modernization
projects.description: Led end-to-end migration of legacy workloads to Azure, focusing on performance, cost, and architectural resilience.

projects.title: FinOps Cloud Governance Program
projects.description: Defined and implemented automated cost-tracking and governance policies, driving consistent 20% savings across multi-subscription accounts.
